regions.name: Central Los Angeles
regions.hero: From Hollywood Boulevard to the Arts District, this is where Los Angeles is loudest, oldest, and most itself. Our booth slips into rooftop weddings, design-week parties, and brand activations across the heart of the city.

neighborhoods.name: Hollywood
neighborhoods.blurb: Iconic backdrops, premiere-night energy, and venues built for the spotlight.

neighborhoods.name: Los Feliz
neighborhoods.blurb: Walkable streets, vintage charm, and intimate gatherings under string lights.

neighborhoods.name: Silver Lake
neighborhoods.blurb: Creative weddings, Sunset Junction parties, and the kind of crowd that knows good light.

neighborhoods.name: Echo Park
neighborhoods.blurb: Lakeside ceremonies, warehouse receptions, and a community that brings the energy.

neighborhoods.name: Koreatown
neighborhoods.blurb: Hidden ballrooms, late-night celebrations, and venues with serious art-deco bones.

neighborhoods.name: Downtown Los Angeles
neighborhoods.blurb: Rooftop venues, historic lofts, and the kind of skyline that becomes the photo backdrop itself.

neighborhoods.name: Westlake
neighborhoods.blurb: MacArthur Park gatherings and historic venues with stories in every brick.

neighborhoods.name: Little Tokyo
neighborhoods.blurb: Cultural events, lantern-lit weddings, and venues that pair beautifully with our wooden booth.

neighborhoods.name: Arts District
neighborhoods.blurb: Warehouse weddings, brand launches, and concrete-walled venues that beg for our walnut warmth.

neighborhoods.name: Chinatown
neighborhoods.blurb: Plaza parties, gallery openings, and weddings with red-lantern color stories.

neighborhoods.name: Mid-Wilshire
neighborhoods.blurb: Museum-row galas and modernist venues with serious architectural pedigree.

neighborhoods.name: Larchmont
neighborhoods.blurb: Small-town feel inside the city — perfect for backyard weddings and family-style events.

neighborhoods.name: Hancock Park
neighborhoods.blurb: Historic estate weddings under century-old trees, with all the old-Hollywood quiet.

neighborhoods.name: Thai Town
neighborhoods.blurb: Festival nights, community gatherings, and weddings full of color and texture.

neighborhoods.name: Little Armenia
neighborhoods.blurb: Multigenerational celebrations and weddings with the warmth that defines this corner of the city.

neighborhoods.name: Virgil Village
neighborhoods.blurb: Quiet weddings, intimate dinners, and the new-east-side crowd that knows good design.

regions.name: Westside Los Angeles
regions.hero: From the sand in Venice to the canyons above Brentwood, the Westside is where modern California unfolds — clean lines, ocean breeze, and design-led venues that our booth was made for.

neighborhoods.name: Santa Monica
neighborhoods.blurb: Beachfront weddings, hotel rooftops, and the kind of golden hour that lasts all evening.

neighborhoods.name: Venice
neighborhoods.blurb: Canal-side ceremonies, Abbot Kinney shop launches, and the most photogenic crowd on the Westside.

neighborhoods.name: Marina del Rey
neighborhoods.blurb: Yacht-club weddings and waterfront receptions with that quiet Pacific calm.

neighborhoods.name: Beverly Hills
neighborhoods.blurb: Hotel ballrooms, garden estates, and the polished glamour the booth lifts beautifully.

neighborhoods.name: West Hollywood
neighborhoods.blurb: Rooftop celebrations, brand parties, and venues built for late nights done right.

neighborhoods.name: Culver City
neighborhoods.blurb: Studio events, modern lofts, and the creative-industry crowd that shows up for great prints.

neighborhoods.name: Century City
neighborhoods.blurb: Corporate galas, hotel ballrooms, and high-rise events with serious city views.

neighborhoods.name: Brentwood
neighborhoods.blurb: Estate weddings under sycamores and intimate gatherings with old-California restraint.

neighborhoods.name: Pacific Palisades
neighborhoods.blurb: Cliffside ceremonies, ocean-view receptions, and weddings that feel coastal without being kitschy.

neighborhoods.name: Playa Vista
neighborhoods.blurb: Tech-campus launches, modern venues, and the design-savvy crowd we love serving.

neighborhoods.name: Westwood
neighborhoods.blurb: University events, hotel galas, and brick-walled venues with academic charm.

neighborhoods.name: Sawtelle
neighborhoods.blurb: Cultural celebrations, restaurant takeovers, and the kind of intimate scale that suits our booth.

regions.name: San Fernando Valley
regions.hero: From Studio City to Calabasas, the Valley brings big backyards, hidden ranches, and a relaxed-but-elevated style of celebration. Our walnut booth feels right at home under string lights and sycamores.

neighborhoods.name: Studio City
neighborhoods.blurb: Industry parties, restaurant takeovers, and weddings with that Ventura Blvd polish.

neighborhoods.name: North Hollywood
neighborhoods.blurb: Arts district events, theater receptions, and venues with creative-industry bones.

neighborhoods.name: Sherman Oaks
neighborhoods.blurb: Hilltop estates, country-club weddings, and family gatherings that go all night.

neighborhoods.name: Encino
neighborhoods.blurb: Backyard weddings, bar mitzvahs, and the kind of multi-generational events we live for.

neighborhoods.name: Tarzana
neighborhoods.blurb: Garden ceremonies and intimate receptions tucked into the south Valley.

neighborhoods.name: Woodland Hills
neighborhoods.blurb: Country-club galas, golf-resort receptions, and big-family weddings that fill the night.

neighborhoods.name: Reseda
neighborhoods.blurb: Community celebrations and weddings with that easy Valley warmth.

neighborhoods.name: Van Nuys
neighborhoods.blurb: Warehouse weddings, brand activations, and the makers' crowd that appreciates good craft.

neighborhoods.name: Panorama City
neighborhoods.blurb: Cultural celebrations, quinces, and weddings full of music and color.

neighborhoods.name: Porter Ranch
neighborhoods.blurb: Hilltop estates, master-planned venues, and weddings with North Valley views.

neighborhoods.name: Burbank
neighborhoods.blurb: Studio activations, premiere parties, and weddings near the lot.

neighborhoods.name: Glendale
neighborhoods.blurb: Historic Brand Park weddings, Armenian celebrations, and venues with serious old-California character.

neighborhoods.name: San Fernando
neighborhoods.blurb: Mission-era venues and weddings with deep family roots.

neighborhoods.name: Calabasas
neighborhoods.blurb: Vineyard-style estates, hilltop ceremonies, and venues that take photographs seriously.

regions.name: San Gabriel Valley
regions.hero: From Pasadena's craftsman estates to Claremont's college-town charm, the San Gabriel Valley delivers some of the most thoughtful, family-rooted celebrations in Southern California. Our booth fits right in.

neighborhoods.name: Pasadena
neighborhoods.blurb: Craftsman estates, Old Town venues, and weddings with that Tournament-of-Roses pedigree.

neighborhoods.name: Arcadia
neighborhoods.blurb: Arboretum weddings, country-club galas, and family-style celebrations that go for hours.

neighborhoods.name: Monrovia
neighborhoods.blurb: Historic-downtown venues, intimate gatherings, and weddings with quiet character.

neighborhoods.name: Alhambra
neighborhoods.blurb: Multigenerational weddings and cultural celebrations with serious heart.

neighborhoods.name: San Gabriel
neighborhoods.blurb: Mission-era charm, family-style banquet halls, and weddings with deep tradition.

neighborhoods.name: Monterey Park
neighborhoods.blurb: Cantonese and Taiwanese wedding banquets done at scale, with style.

neighborhoods.name: Rosemead
neighborhoods.blurb: Family celebrations, quinces, and multi-course wedding banquets.

neighborhoods.name: Temple City
neighborhoods.blurb: Quiet residential venues and family-rooted weddings.

neighborhoods.name: El Monte
neighborhoods.blurb: Community celebrations, quinces, and weddings with serious family pride.

neighborhoods.name: West Covina
neighborhoods.blurb: Suburban venues, country-club receptions, and big-family weddings.

neighborhoods.name: Covina
neighborhoods.blurb: Historic downtown weddings and family celebrations with old-California warmth.

neighborhoods.name: Glendora
neighborhoods.blurb: Citrus-country estates and weddings under heritage oaks.

neighborhoods.name: Azusa
neighborhoods.blurb: Foothills weddings, family celebrations, and venues with mountain views.

neighborhoods.name: San Dimas
neighborhoods.blurb: Equestrian-country weddings and family-style celebrations.

neighborhoods.name: La Verne
neighborhoods.blurb: College-town weddings, vineyard estates, and gatherings with quiet polish.

neighborhoods.name: Rowland Heights
neighborhoods.blurb: Cultural wedding banquets and family celebrations with serious scale.

neighborhoods.name: Hacienda Heights
neighborhoods.blurb: Hilltop estates and multigenerational family weddings.

neighborhoods.name: Diamond Bar
neighborhoods.blurb: Country-club weddings, master-planned venues, and family galas.

neighborhoods.name: Claremont
neighborhoods.blurb: College-town weddings under century-old trees and intimate garden ceremonies.

regions.name: Southeast Los Angeles
regions.hero: From Downey to Cerritos, this is where the biggest family weddings, quinceañeras, and multi-generational celebrations happen. Our booth shows up for the late-night dance floor and the family portrait alike.

neighborhoods.name: Downey
neighborhoods.blurb: Big-family weddings, quinces, and the kind of dance floor that runs past midnight.

neighborhoods.name: Whittier
neighborhoods.blurb: Historic-downtown venues and family weddings with serious roots.

neighborhoods.name: Norwalk
neighborhoods.blurb: Community celebrations and weddings that feel like the whole neighborhood showed up.

neighborhoods.name: Cerritos
neighborhoods.blurb: Modern venues, performing-arts-center events, and weddings with crisp suburban polish.

neighborhoods.name: Lakewood
neighborhoods.blurb: Family-style weddings and community celebrations.

neighborhoods.name: Bellflower
neighborhoods.blurb: Multigenerational family events and weddings full of music.

neighborhoods.name: Pico Rivera
neighborhoods.blurb: Family weddings, quinces, and celebrations rooted in this corner of LA.

neighborhoods.name: Montebello
neighborhoods.blurb: Hillside weddings, family celebrations, and venues with serious character.

neighborhoods.name: Paramount
neighborhoods.blurb: Community-rooted celebrations and weddings that pack the dance floor.

regions.name: South Bay
regions.hero: From Manhattan Beach to Long Beach, the South Bay delivers sandy ceremonies, harbor-side receptions, and that golden-hour glow that makes every print look intentional.

neighborhoods.name: Long Beach
neighborhoods.blurb: Harbor-side weddings, hotel rooftops, and aquarium galas with serious skyline drama.

neighborhoods.name: Manhattan Beach
neighborhoods.blurb: Beach-club weddings, oceanfront receptions, and weddings that lean into the golden hour.

neighborhoods.name: Hermosa Beach
neighborhoods.blurb: Pier-side celebrations and beach-volleyball-courtyard weddings.

neighborhoods.name: Redondo Beach
neighborhoods.blurb: Harbor weddings, historic-pier events, and family beach gatherings.

neighborhoods.name: Torrance
neighborhoods.blurb: Country-club weddings, hotel galas, and family celebrations across the South Bay.

neighborhoods.name: El Segundo
neighborhoods.blurb: Tech-campus activations, small-downtown weddings, and modern brand launches.

neighborhoods.name: Palos Verdes Estates
neighborhoods.blurb: Cliffside ceremonies, ocean-view weddings, and estates with serious old-California pedigree.

neighborhoods.name: San Pedro
neighborhoods.blurb: Harbor-front weddings, warehouse venues, and weddings with maritime character.

regions.name: Orange County
regions.hero: From Newport Harbor to the Anaheim Convention Center, Orange County delivers some of the most polished weddings and largest brand activations in Southern California. We travel the 5 happily.

neighborhoods.name: Anaheim
neighborhoods.blurb: Convention-center activations, hotel ballrooms, and big-scale family weddings.

neighborhoods.name: Irvine
neighborhoods.blurb: Master-planned venues, corporate galas, and weddings with modern California polish.

neighborhoods.name: Santa Ana
neighborhoods.blurb: Historic-downtown weddings, artist-studio venues, and culturally rich celebrations.

neighborhoods.name: Fullerton
neighborhoods.blurb: College-town weddings, downtown venues, and family-rooted celebrations.

neighborhoods.name: Orange
neighborhoods.blurb: Historic Old Towne weddings and intimate garden ceremonies.

neighborhoods.name: Costa Mesa
neighborhoods.blurb: Modern venues, design-district activations, and weddings with serious creative direction.

neighborhoods.name: Huntington Beach
neighborhoods.blurb: Beachfront weddings, surf-town receptions, and California-casual celebrations.

neighborhoods.name: Newport Beach
neighborhoods.blurb: Yacht-club weddings, oceanfront estates, and the most polished celebrations on the coast.

neighborhoods.name: Garden Grove
neighborhoods.blurb: Banquet-hall weddings, cultural celebrations, and family events at scale.

neighborhoods.name: Brea
neighborhoods.blurb: Country-club weddings and family-rooted celebrations.

neighborhoods.name: Yorba Linda
neighborhoods.blurb: Estate weddings and quiet, family-driven celebrations.

neighborhoods.name: Tustin
neighborhoods.blurb: Historic-hangar weddings and modern venues with serious architectural presence.

regions.name: Ventura County Edge
regions.tagline: Hill country, just past the city line.
regions.hero: From Thousand Oaks to Simi Valley, the Ventura edge gives weddings room to breathe — vineyard estates, oak-shaded ceremonies, and venues with that quiet Conejo polish.

neighborhoods.name: Thousand Oaks
neighborhoods.blurb: Oak-shaded estates, family ranches, and weddings with that Conejo Valley quiet.

neighborhoods.name: Agoura Hills
neighborhoods.blurb: Country-club weddings, vineyard estates, and intimate ceremonies in the hills.

neighborhoods.name: Westlake Village
neighborhoods.blurb: Lakefront weddings, resort ballrooms, and elegant family celebrations.

neighborhoods.name: Simi Valley
neighborhoods.blurb: Ranch weddings, hilltop estates, and family-rooted celebrations.
